name: WeldMark.SeamVisibilityAttributes
summary: The SeamVisibilityAttributes class is the attributes class for the weld seam visibility.

constructors.name: WeldMark.SeamVisibilityAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new weld seam visibility attributes instance.

constructors.name: WeldMark.SeamVisibilityAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new weld seam visibility attributes instance with the given attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: ShowAngle
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam angle is visible.

properties.name: ShowContour
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam contour is visible.

properties.name: ShowEffectiveThroat
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam effective throat is visible.

properties.name: ShowFinish
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam finish is visible.

properties.name: ShowLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam length is visible.

properties.name: ShowPitch
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam pitch is visible.

properties.name: ShowPrefix
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam prefix is visible.

properties.name: ShowRootOpening
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam root opening is visible.

properties.name: ShowSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam size is visible.

properties.name: ShowType
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the seam type is visible.
